package rulefixtures

// scenario for type_assertion_without_comma_ok: `v := i.(T)` without the comma-ok form in non-panic-safe code
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule688PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario688Positive(records []Rule688PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
